productDisplayName: Lotto Men Dunk Hi Black Sports Shoes
description: Designed for urban style and comfort, the lotto Dunk Hi has a great sporty look which will ensure your feet are the centre of attention. Upper Textured synthetic leather upper with patent overlays Lightly perforated toe upper and sides for added breathability and dry, fresh comfort High profile design provides ankle support with lower back to give flexibility to your foot Meshed and padded tongue and sockliner for snug Fit and added protection from shock Lace-up system for snug fit Haul loop on back ankle Midsole Full length EVA midsole for added cushioning and impact protection Outsole Chunky-look sole with herringbone grooves for added traction and absolute grip shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
